_comment: The tracer data model: the four node types and their typed links.
This is documentation, not a server schema — the skill holds the graph in
memory (scripts/trace_io.py), which checks these link shapes structurally.
Links hold the target node's adapter-assigned id (sym:.../step:.../tok:...).
Connascence kind keys (CoN, CoI, ...) are NOT defined here — they are opaque
strings in TraceConn.attributes.kind, interpreted by scripts/connascence.py.

TraceSymbol._purpose: A function/method definition — the target of calls (static spine).

TraceToken._purpose: A passed/returned value. identity is run-scoped; value_hash is cross-run.

TraceStep._purpose: A call site (static) or an invocation (dynamic). caller=dynamic tree; in_symbol=static spine; realizes joins them.

TraceConn._purpose: A detected connascence (overlay). elements = the coupled nodes; degree = len(elements).
